personal.name: Paolo Sandejas
personal.title: AI/ML Engineer | Multi-Modal AI & Creative Applications

summary: Production ML engineer who ships creative, multi-modal AI systems that scale. 2+ years building ML in production serving 12,000+ users. Specializing in audio AI, computer vision, and generative models with full-stack deployment capabilities.

valueProps.title: Multi-Modal AI
valueProps.description: Video, audio, text generation pipelines with Gemini, OpenAI, Claude APIs

valueProps.title: Creative Applications
valueProps.description: Real-time audio ML, wearable interfaces, generative systems

projects.title: CHULOOPA - Transformer-Based Drum Generation
projects.description: Low-latency transformer model for real-time rhythmic generation in live performance. Researching efficient inference pipelines for generative audio systems.

projects.title: Multi-Modal Video Analysis System
projects.description: Real-time video analysis pipeline with optimized concurrent processing for low-latency response. Built for production deployment serving thousands of users.

projects.title: Geospatial ML Pipeline
projects.description: Custom CNN architecture for geospatial analysis with data preprocessing and evaluation framework. Achieved >90% accuracy through model optimization.

projects.title: HAI - Head as Interface
projects.description: Wearable gestural interface for musical performance using IMU sensors. Real-time Max/MSP audio processing controlled by head movements via Arduino.

projects.title: ASCII Drone Synth
projects.description: Gesture-controlled drone synthesizer for live performance using computer vision. MediaPipe hand tracking drives web audio synthesis with Tone.js.

projects.title: Parallel Paths - Responsible AI in Music
projects.description: Exploration of responsible AI integration in songwriting practice using Gemini and Suno APIs. Research on ethical creative AI workflows.

bullets: Built real-time multi-modal video analysis system using Google Gemini API with concurrent processing pipelines optimized for low-latency response.
Architected GenAI solutions integrating multiple LLM APIs (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude) into production systems serving 12,000+ users.
Designed AI recommendation engine with evaluation framework and data processing pipelines for high-volume workflows.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define system requirements, contribute to design reviews, and maintain documentation.
Developed production LLM assistant with ReAct agents and RAG; implemented retrieval pipelines, embeddings, and prompt engineering for text generation.
Built geospatial ML pipelines using PyTorch with custom architectures; achieved >90% accuracy through model optimization and data preprocessing.
Designed model evaluation frameworks and debugging workflows to validate ML concept feasibility for production deployment.
Triaged system issues, analyzed impact on service quality, and implemented solutions across ML infrastructure.
Established best practices through code reviews and technical documentation for team scaling from 4 to 13 engineers.

education.degree: Master of Fine Arts in Music Technology
bullets: Developing real-time generative audio systems with PyTorch; researching low-latency ML inference and custom audio generation models.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
bullets: Built computer vision pipelines using Python, OpenCV, and scikit-learn. Coursework in algorithms, data structures, and ML.
